overall.description: Gameplay footage from Spider-Man: Miles Morales featuring the protagonist web-swinging through a snow-covered Manhattan. The character descends from high altitude into a park, traverses urban streets, scales a glass skyscraper, and navigates rooftops with fluid acrobatic movement.

events.description: begins rapid descent from high altitude toward park

agents.ego_description: plummeting from high altitude toward a snowy park, preparing for landing in the amphitheater

entered.detail: Classic brownstone brick building with multiple windows and snow on ledges
Tall contemporary building with reflective glass facade
Circular tiered seating structure covered in snow
Deciduous trees with snow-covered branches lining the park

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a high-altitude aerial view of a snowy Manhattan park. The camera descends rapidly toward a snow-covered amphitheater where pedestrians are scattered about. The character lands smoothly in the center of the amphitheater, with tall brick and glass buildings framing the background.

events.description: comes to a complete stop and stands up from landing crouch
crouches and launches into the air to begin web-swinging

agents.ego_description: standing in the amphitheater, looking around at the surroundings and pedestrians before preparing to launch into the air

segments.scene_description: After landing, the character stands in the snow-covered amphitheater, panning the camera to observe the surroundings. Pedestrians are visible walking around the park area. The character then crouches and leaps into the air to resume traversal.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban canyon streets between tall buildings

events.description: begins web-swinging through city streets at high speed
swings around corner into new street canyon with different building architecture

agents.ego_description: rapidly web-swinging between buildings, navigating through urban canyons with fluid acrobatic movements

entered.detail: Red brick residential buildings with fire escapes and snow on window sills
Modern high-rise buildings with reflective glass surfaces
Asphalt streets covered with snow and slush with cars driving below

segments.scene_description: The character web-swings through narrow urban canyons between brick apartment buildings and glass office towers. The camera arcs smoothly as the character gains momentum, swinging over snow-covered streets where sparse traffic moves below. The environment transitions from the open park to enclosed city streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise building facades and upper city skyline

events.description: transitions from swinging to wall-running up glass skyscraper facade
launches off building top and resumes high-altitude swinging with harbor view

agents.ego_description: running vertically up the side of a glass skyscraper, then launching into high-altitude web-swinging with expansive views of the harbor and distant skyline

entered.detail: Tall modern building with reflective blue-tinted glass windows
Body of water visible in the distance between buildings
Snow-dusted flat roof with HVAC equipment

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from street-level swinging to vertical traversal, running up the side of a towering glass skyscraper. Upon reaching the roof, the character launches into high-altitude web-swinging, revealing expansive views of the harbor and distant city skyline before approaching another rooftop.

scene_state.functional_zone: snow-dusted building rooftop with mechanical equipment

events.description: lands on rooftop and transitions into running across the surface
reaches building edge and leaps off into aerial descent

agents.ego_description: landing on a snowy rooftop, running across the concrete surface past HVAC units, then leaping off the edge to continue aerial traversal

entered.detail: Large rectangular heating and ventilation equipment on the roof
Safety railing along the edge of the building roof

segments.scene_description: The character lands on a flat concrete rooftop dusted with snow, runs past HVAC equipment and metal railings, then leaps off the building edge to resume web-swinging. The surrounding skyscrapers frame the scene as the character departs the rooftop.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that descends from a high-altitude aerial view of a snowy park into the dense urban canyons of Manhattan before ascending back toward the skyline. It begins with a rapid dive toward a snow-covered amphitheater where the character lands amidst scattered pedestrians, framed by towering brick and glass architecture. As the character leaps back into the air, the scene shifts from the open park to enclosed city streets, with the camera arcing smoothly through narrow gaps between apartment buildings and office towers. The momentum then carries the character from street-level swinging into a vertical climb up a glass skyscraper, opening up to an expansive view of the harbor and distant skyline. Finally, the camera follows a sprint across a snow-dusted concrete rooftop past industrial equipment before the character leaps off the edge to resume swinging between the surrounding skyscrapers.
